$schema_note: Zava demo Fabric/orchestration config. Copy to deploy_config.json (gitignored) and replace <PLACEHOLDER> tokens. NO secrets in this file: secrets are referenced by Key Vault name or acquired via `az login` at runtime. Validate with: python scripts/config_schema.py --validate fabric/config/deploy_config.sample.json databricks/config/databricks_config.sample.json

capacity._comment: Fresh-provision path (use_existing=false) is the default. To bring your own Fabric capacity, set use_existing=true and fill existing_capacity_id with a real ARM resource id.
capacity.name: zava-fabric-cap

workspace._comment: Fresh path creates the workspace + Workspace Identity (Step 10). Existing path attaches to existing_workspace_id. identity_object_id is a placeholder until Workspace Identity is created in Step 10.
workspace.name: zava-fabric-ws
workspace._comment_step10: Fields below are read by fabric/scripts/00_create_workspace.py (Step 10). description: workspace description on create. capacity_ref: which Fabric capacity (by display name) to bind; defaults to capacity.name above. enable_workspace_identity: toggle Workspace Identity provisioning (default true). admin_object_id: optional deploy-SP object id to add as workspace Admin (placeholder; az ad sp show --id <app-id> --query id).

alerting._comment: Required when features.enable_activator_email=true. Placeholder only — never commit a real address.
